summary: Iteration 8 — Asset-only fix verification for native Android splash/icon branding. All 4 new PNGs validated (correct dimensions, distinct md5s, correct transparency/opacity). app.json checked for splash-screen config, android.versionCode=2, adaptiveIcon bg=#1E3A8A. expo-doctor: 18/18 passed. Backend GET /api/ returns 200 with correct payload. Frontend web smoke loads the branded Doggy Breeding App splash (TANUVAS, dual-dog doggy logo, GUIDED BY, ANIMitra). NOTE: Native pre-RN splash on Android device cannot be verified in CI — only assets+config validated. User must rebuild APK (versionCode 2) and reinstall to see the new native splash.

icon_png.status: PASS - opaque navy bg with logo

adaptive_icon_png.status: PASS - transparent bg with logo in safe zone

splash_icon_png.status: PASS - transparent bg with logo, distinct from defaults

action_items: User must rebuild the Android APK (EAS/Expo build) with the new assets and android.versionCode=2, then reinstall on the real device. Only a real-device install can confirm the native pre-RN splash now shows the doggy logo on navy (cannot be verified in this CI/web preview).
critical_code_review_comments: Verified that splash-icon.png is no longer the default Emergent 'e' on navy — md5 changed and it is now a transparent-bg image containing the doggy logo. Combined with the expo-splash-screen plugin backgroundColor=#1E3A8A, the native splash will be the navy bg with doggy logo at imageWidth=220.
android.versionCode bumped to 2 — required so the new APK can be installed over the previous v1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Native Android splash/icon assets and config are validated. The only remaining verification is a real-device install of a freshly rebuilt APK (versionCode=2) to visually confirm the navy+doggy-logo native splash. This cannot be done in the CI/web preview environment.
rca_of_issue: RCA: Previous APK shipped with the unchanged default Emergent template PNGs at assets/images/{icon,adaptive-icon,splash-icon,favicon}.png. The expo-splash-screen plugin renders splash-icon.png on the configured backgroundColor at the OS-native stage before React Native boots, so the default 'Start building apps on emergent' icon image was shown. Mitigation: regenerate all four PNGs with the official Doggy Breeding App dual-dog logo composited at appropriate scales (icon opaque 78%, adaptive 62% safe zone, splash 86% transparent, favicon 64x64) and bump android.versionCode to 2 so the user can install over v1. Verified asset dimensions, transparency, distinctness, and config in app.json; expo-doctor 18/18 passes.
